meta.note: 已赛场次复盘;每个比赛日完赛后追加。

matches.narrative_zh: 世界杯揭幕战,墨西哥在阿兹台克球场2-0完胜南非,终结了队史揭幕战不胜的魔咒。第9分钟,基尼奥内斯抢断对方门将的冒失出球率先破门;第67分钟,希门尼斯头球接阿尔瓦拉多传中锁定胜局,苦等12年迎来世界杯处子球。80824名观众同时见证了历史:西托莱(49分钟)、兹瓦内(84分钟,VAR介入)与蒙特斯(补时)相继染红,揭幕战史上首现三张红牌。墨西哥控球率60%,预期进球1.44对0.07,全面压制对手。
matches.narrative_en: Mexico opened the 2026 World Cup with a commanding 2-0 win over South Africa before 80,824 at the Estadio Azteca — their first-ever victory in a World Cup opening match. Julián Quiñones pounced on a loose pass from the goalkeeper to score in the 9th minute, and Raúl Jiménez, after a 12-year wait, headed in Roberto Alvarado's left-footed cross in the 67th for his first career World Cup goal. The night turned ugly late: Sphephelo Sithole (49') and Themba Zwane (84', after a VAR review) saw red for South Africa, and Mexico's César Montes followed in stoppage time — the first World Cup opener ever to produce three red cards. Mexico dominated with 60% possession and a 1.44-0.07 edge in expected goals.

events.text_zh: 基尼奥内斯抢断南非门将的冒失出球,冷静推射首开纪录,打入本届世界杯第一球
events.text_en: Julián Quiñones pounces on a loose pass from South Africa's goalkeeper and slots home the tournament's first goal

events.text_zh: 西托莱在反击中放倒古铁雷斯被直接红牌罚下,南非十人应战
events.text_en: Sphephelo Sithole is sent off for cutting down Brian Gutiérrez on a breakaway, reducing South Africa to ten men

events.text_zh: 希门尼斯头球打进阿尔瓦拉多的左脚传中,苦等12年终获世界杯处子球,2-0
events.text_en: Raúl Jiménez heads in Roberto Alvarado's left-footed cross for his first career World Cup goal, 2-0

events.text_zh: 兹瓦内挥手击中阿尔瓦拉多面部,经VAR介入后被红牌罚下,南非只剩九人
events.text_en: Themba Zwane sees red after a VAR review for catching Alvarado in the face, leaving South Africa with nine

events.text_zh: 蒙特斯补时阶段蓄意撞人被罚下——世界杯揭幕战历史上首次出现三张红牌
events.text_en: César Montes is dismissed in stoppage time for a deliberate body check — a record third red card in a World Cup opening match

matches.turning_zh: 第49分钟西托莱在反击中犯规被直接罚下是全场分水岭——刚过半场便少打一人的南非自此再无反扑之力,墨西哥从容掌控节奏直至终场。
matches.turning_en: Sphephelo Sithole's 49th-minute red card, conceded halting a breakaway just after the restart, was the breaking point — down a man, South Africa never threatened a comeback.

matches.narrative_zh: 韩国队在瓜达拉哈拉的阿克伦球场上演逆转,2-1击败时隔20年重返世界杯的捷克。第59分钟,克雷伊奇接考法尔长掷界外球头球首开纪录;第67分钟,黄仁范虚晃摆脱防守兜射扳平,又在第80分钟助攻替补登场的吴贤揆完成反超,成为1994年以来首位在世界杯单场传射建功的韩国球员。捷克第77分钟苏切克的进球因越位被吹掉。韩国全场控球率62%,射门15比7,预期进球1.84对0.81,数据全面占优,44985名观众见证了这场翻盘。
matches.narrative_en: South Korea came from behind to beat Czechia 2-1 at the Estadio Akron in Zapopan, spoiling the Czechs' first World Cup appearance since 2006. Ladislav Krejčí headed in Vladimír Coufal's long throw on 59 minutes — Czechia's first World Cup goal in 20 years — but Hwang In-beom answered in the 67th with a deft finish inside the post. After Tomáš Souček's 77th-minute effort was ruled out for offside, substitute Oh Hyeon-gyu, on for captain Son Heung-min, swept in Hwang's pass on 80 minutes to complete the turnaround. Hwang became the first South Korean since 1994 to score and assist in a single World Cup game, and Korea's 62% possession and 1.84-0.81 xG edge in front of 44,985 fans reflected their control.

events.text_zh: 孙兴慜获得黄金机会,被捷克门将科瓦日神勇扑出
events.text_en: Matěj Kovář produces a fine save to deny Son Heung-min a golden opportunity

events.text_zh: 克雷伊奇接考法尔长掷界外球头球破门,捷克打入2006年以来的首粒世界杯进球
events.text_en: Ladislav Krejčí heads in Vladimír Coufal's long throw — Czechia's first World Cup goal since 2006

events.text_zh: 黄仁范虚晃摆脱两名防守球员后兜射近角入网,韩国扳平
events.text_en: Hwang In-beom fakes past two defenders and curls a deft finish inside the post to level for South Korea

events.text_zh: 关键换人:吴贤揆替下队长孙兴慜,改变了韩国队前插的节奏
events.text_en: Oh Hyeon-gyu replaces captain Son Heung-min, immediately changing the timing of Korea's runs in behind

events.text_zh: 苏切克破门被判越位在先,捷克扳平进球无效
events.text_en: Tomáš Souček has a would-be equalizer ruled out for offside

events.text_zh: 吴贤揆接黄仁范助攻左脚推射破门,韩国2-1完成逆转
events.text_en: Substitute Oh Hyeon-gyu turns in Hwang In-beom's pass with his left foot to complete the comeback, 2-1

matches.turning_zh: 第69分钟换下队长孙兴慜、换上吴贤揆的决定成为胜负手——生力军改变了韩国队身后插上的节奏,登场11分钟后便接黄仁范助攻打入制胜球。
matches.turning_en: The bold 69th-minute call to withdraw captain Son Heung-min for Oh Hyeon-gyu swung the game — the substitute's runs stretched Czechia's back line, and eleven minutes later he turned in Hwang In-beom's pass for the winner.
